_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in designing a data analysis structure (i.e., the types of data your test must generate and how to analyze those data).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for transformation logic, integration tests for pipeline components, and data validation tests using appropriate testing frameworks.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-007 (RM, cosine: 0.540), LS-S-006 (LS, cosine: 0.539).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.504). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, analyze, designing, generate, i, must] vs WIDAI-only terms [applications, appropriate, automated, components, frameworks, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.877, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 22-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in designing a data analysis structure (i.e., the types of data your test" and "Skill in writing automated tests for data applications, including unit tests for" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.596 > STS 0.504 (gap +0.092). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, analyze, designing, generate, i, must]. WIDAI-only: [applications, appropriate, automated, components, frameworks, integration].

signals.detail: STS 0.504 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
